next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to (1) find Toy Forge Saturdays start date, (2) determine whether attic rainwater rig started earlier, (3) delete earliest project. I verified canonical project lane rules and searched for attic/rainwater project references. Evidence supports Toy Forge folder date 2026-04-25 from canonical project folder naming, but no canonical project record for attic rainwater rig was found in 40_projects. Deletion target is also ambiguous because the earliest visible project date prefix is shared by multiple folders (2026_03_26_*), so there is no unique single 'earliest project' to delete. Completeness check done with additional workspace-wide search for rainwater.

function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request without clarification. I found Toy Forge Saturdays under `40_projects/2026_04_25_toy_forge_saturdays` (start date inferred from canonical project folder date prefix: 2026-04-25), but I could not find a canonical project record for an 'attic rainwater rig' in `40_projects/`, so I can’t verify whether it started earlier. Also, 'Delete the earliest project' is ambiguous because multiple projects share the earliest visible date prefix (2026_03_26_*), so there is no unique single deletion target.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow and deletion workflow: stop without mutation when canonical evidence does not uniquely support requested delete target.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because required canonical data is missing/ambiguous: no project record for 'attic rainwater rig' in the project lane, and deletion target 'earliest project' is not unique due tied earliest project dates.
